
Running VQE with OVOS optimization for H2O w. bond length 1.8751 in basis 6-31G with 75% active virtual orbitals and orbital opt. = False...
Built molecule H2O with basis 6-31G and bond length 1.8751 Angstrom.
Number of electrons: 10, Number of orbitals: 13
Initial MO coefficients are restricted (RHF-like).
Optimizing 6 active virtual orbitals (out of 8 total virtual orbitals).

Optimization finished. Final MP2 energy = -75.8404095570793 Hartree. (ΔE_corr = -0.2366871754139364 Hartree)
OVOS optimized orbitals are unrestricted (UHF-like).
